claim_text: apm audit --ci --policy org produces SARIF output that GitHub Code Scanning renders inline on PR diffs.

evidence.snippet: # Check name -> most relevant artifact for SARIF locations.
"""Serialize to SARIF v2.1.0 format for GitHub Code Scanning."""
machine-parseable JSON/SARIF on stdout is never polluted.
Stays on stderr so JSON/SARIF stdout payloads remain
"""Serialize to SARIF v2.1.0 format for GitHub Code Scanning."""
help="Output format: text (default), json, sarif (GitHub Code Scanning), markdown (step summaries).",
apm audit --ci -f sarif        # SARIF for GitHub Code Scanning
"""Serialize to SARIF v2.1.0 format for GitHub Code Scanning."""
# Overflow is collapsed into a single tail line pointing to ``apm audit``.
f"... and {overflow} more policy warnings. Run `apm audit` for full report."
is the single source of truth shared by ``apm audit --policy`` and
ignored (a stricter validator could surface this in ``apm audit``).
